nasb.text: But he said, “You shall not pass through.” And Edom came out against him with a heavy force and with a strong hand.

esv.text: But he said, “You shall not pass through.” And Edom came out against them with a large army and with a strong force.

cnv.text: 以東王說：“你不可經過。”他就率領很多人出來，要用強硬的手攻擊以色列人。

ccb.text: 但以东王仍然不准，还率领大军严阵以待。
